title: Winsome Clear Carpet Protector Film Self Adhesive Roll Temporary Protecting Water Resistant Floor Dust Sheet Cover | 60cm x 25m Roll (60 Micron)
features: Winsome Self Adhesive Carpet Protector is an innovative and exceptional plastic barrier; It is the most effective way to protect carpet in high traffic areas during production shoots and construction
Winsome Clear Carpet Protector mat is the professional choice of location mangers, contractors, realtors and home builders

Applications: This carpet protector Film can be used in Commercial Construction, Open House, Moving Day, Painting, RV, new carpet installation, Boats, Restaurants, Hotels, Model Homes, Trade Shows, Parties, Art & Crafts, Building Renovation, Residential Construction and Stairs
Winsome carpet protector roll is Self-adhesive carpet sheet protection; Easy to use and remove; ideal stair carpet protector
Non-skid surface; stays in place; Up to 30 day temporary protection; This Carpet Protector Roll Needs two people to lay down perfectly
description: Product Description Previous page A must-have for contractors to keep floors clean. Provides non-slip safety in frequently used areas. Protect carpets during painting, remodeling, and repairs. Next page 1 Construction & Remodeling 2 Stairs & Hallways 3 Home Renovations & DIY 100% Liquid Protection The advanced liquid shield repels paint, chemicals, and spills, keeping carpets protected and cleanup effortless. Stronger Defense Made from 60-micron high-strength vinyl PVC, our carpet protector resists tears and punctures for superior performance over standard protectors. No Residue after Removal Not for high-pile wool or plush carpets. Remove after 20 days. When used correctly, it ensures easy cleanup with no sticky residue. Non- Slip & Secure Design Our Carpet Protector stays in place, reducing trip hazards and ensuring safety on stairs, hallways, and commercial spaces. Can this be used on stairs? Yes! This self-adhesive carpet protector stays securely in place, making it great for stairs and hallways. How long can I leave it on my carpet? Up to 30 days with proper application. Does it leave a sticky residue after removal? No, it peels off cleanly without damaging or staining carpets. Can I use this on wool or high-pile carpets? No, this product is not suitable for wool, plush, or high-pile carpets. Always test on a small area first.
